zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard De Hassal於大約1308年出生在英國爾韓可洛福時，他的父親Richard De Hassal27歲，母親Ellena de Bechton11歲。他於大約1322年與Mrs Richard De Hassal在英國英格蘭爾韓可洛福結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1384年在英國英格蘭享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard De Hassal于大约1308年出生在英国爾韓可洛福时，他的父亲Richard De Hassal27岁，母亲Ellena de Bechton11岁。他于大约1322年与Mrs Richard De Hassal在英国英格兰爾韓可洛福结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1384年在英国英格兰享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hassal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard De Hassal was born about 1308, in Hankelow, Cheshire, England, his father, Richard De Hassal, was 27 and his mother, Ellena de Bechton, was 11. He married Mrs Richard De Hassal about 1322, in Hankelow, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1384, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard De Hassal est né environ 1308, à Hankelow, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard De Hassal, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ellena de Bechton, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Richard De Hassal environ 1322, à Hankelow, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1384, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard De Hassal um 1308 in Hankelow, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard De Hassal 27 und seine Mutter Ellena de Bechton 11. Er hat um 1322 in Hankelow, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs Richard De Hassal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1384 im Alter von 77 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard De Hassal è nato il circa 1308 nel Hankelow, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Richard De Hassal, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Ellena de Bechton, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Richard De Hassal circa 1322, nel Hankelow, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1384, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard De Hassalが約1308年にイギリスチェシュアイアハンケロウで生まれた時，父Richard De Hassalは27歳，母Ellena de Bechtonは11歳であった。約1322年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハンケロウでMrs Richard De Hassalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1384年にイギリスイギリスで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard De Hassal(이)가 대략 1308년 영국 체실르 핸켈로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard De Hassal(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellena de Bechton(은)는 11세였다. 그는 대략 1322년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 핸켈로에서 Mrs Richard De Hassal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1384년 영국 잉글랜드에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard De Hassal nasceu aproximadamente 1308, em Hankelow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard De Hassal, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Ellena de Bechton, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Richard De Hassal aproximadamente 1322, em Hankelow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1384, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard De Hassal родился около 1308 г. в местности ханкелоу, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard De Hassal было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellena de Bechton, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Richard De Hassal около 1322 г. в местности ханкелоу, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1384 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard De Hassal nació aproximadamente 1308, en Hankelow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard De Hassal, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Ellena de Bechton, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Mrs Richard De Hassal aproximadamente 1322, en Hankelow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1384, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años.
